004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.json;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.commons.lang.*;
025import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
027
028/**
029 * Specialized writer for serializing JSON.
030 *
031 * <h5 class='section'>Notes:</h5><ul>
032 *    <li class='note'>
033 *       This class is not intended for external use.
034 * </ul>
035 *
036 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
037 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JsonSupport">JSON Basics</a>
038
039 * </ul>
040 */
041@SuppressWarnings({
042   "resource" // Writer resource managed by calling code
043})
044public class JsonWriter extends SerializerWriter {
045
046   // Characters that trigger special handling of serializing attribute values.
047   // @formatter:off
048   private static final AsciiSet encodedChars = AsciiSet.of("\n\t\b\f\r'\"\\");
049   private static final AsciiSet encodedChars2 = AsciiSet.of("\n\t\b\f\r'\"\\/");
050
051   private static final KeywordSet reservedWords = new KeywordSet(
052      "arguments","break","case","catch","class","const","continue","debugger","default","delete",
053      "do","else","enum","eval","export","extends","false","finally","for","function","if",
054      "implements","import","in","instanceof","interface","let","new","null","package",
055      "private","protected","public","return","static","super","switch","this","throw",
056      "true","try","typeof","var","void","while","with","undefined","yield"
057   );
058   // @formatter:on
059
060   // Characters that represent attribute name characters that don't trigger quoting.
061   // These are actually more strict than the actual Javascript specification, but
062   // can be narrowed in the future if necessary.
063   // For example, we quote attributes that start with $ even though we don't need to.
064   private static final AsciiSet validAttrChars = AsciiSet.create().ranges("a-z", "A-Z", "0-9").chars("_").build();
065
066   private static final AsciiSet validFirstAttrChars = AsciiSet.create().ranges("a-z", "A-Z").chars("_").build();
067   private final boolean simpleAttrs;
068   private final boolean escapeSolidus;
069
070   private final AsciiSet ec;
071
072   /**
073    * Constructor.
074    *
075    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
076    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, tabs and spaces will be used in output.
077    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
078    * @param escapeSolidus If <jk>true</jk>, forward slashes should be escaped in the output.
079    * @param quoteChar The quote character to use (i.e. <js>'\''</js> or <js>'"'</js>)
080    * @param simpleAttrs If <jk>true</jk>, JSON attributes will only be quoted when necessary.
081    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, strings will be trimmed before being serialized.
082    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver for resolving URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
083    */
084   @SuppressWarnings({
085      "java:S107" // Constructor requires 8 parameters for JSON writer configuration
086   })
087   protected JsonWriter(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean escapeSolidus, char quoteChar, boolean simpleAttrs, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver) {
088      super(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, trimStrings, quoteChar, uriResolver);
089      this.simpleAttrs = simpleAttrs;
090      this.escapeSolidus = escapeSolidus;
091      this.ec = escapeSolidus ? encodedChars2 : encodedChars;
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Creates a new JsonWriter instance.
096    * <p>
097    * Provided for subclasses in other packages (e.g. Json5SerializerSession) that need to create JsonWriter instances.
098    *
099    * @param out The writer being wrapped.
100    * @param useWhitespace If <jk>true</jk>, tabs and spaces will be used in output.
101    * @param maxIndent The maximum indentation level.
102    * @param escapeSolidus If <jk>true</jk>, forward slashes should be escaped in the output.
103    * @param quoteChar The quote character to use (i.e. <js>'\''</js> or <js>'"'</js>)
104    * @param simpleAttrs If <jk>true</jk>, JSON attributes will only be quoted when necessary.
105    * @param trimStrings If <jk>true</jk>, strings will be trimmed before being serialized.
106    * @param uriResolver The URI resolver for resolving URIs to absolute or root-relative form.
107    * @return A new JsonWriter instance.
108    */
109   @SuppressWarnings({
110      "java:S107" // Factory method mirrors the constructor; all 8 parameters are distinct JSON writer configuration settings
111   })
112   public static JsonWriter create(Writer out, boolean useWhitespace, int maxIndent, boolean escapeSolidus, char quoteChar, boolean simpleAttrs, boolean trimStrings, UriResolver uriResolver) {
113      return new JsonWriter(out, useWhitespace, maxIndent, escapeSolidus, quoteChar, simpleAttrs, trimStrings, uriResolver);
114   }
115
116   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
117   public JsonWriter append(char c) {
118      super.append(c);
119      return this;
120   }
121
122   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
123   public JsonWriter append(char[] value) {
124      super.append(value);
125      return this;
126   }
127
128   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
129   public JsonWriter append(int indent, char c) {
130      super.append(indent, c);
131      return this;
132   }
133
134   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
135   public JsonWriter append(int indent, String text) {
136      super.append(indent, text);
137      return this;
138   }
139
140   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
141   public JsonWriter append(Object text) {
142      super.append(text);
143      return this;
144   }
145
146   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
147   public JsonWriter append(String text) {
148      super.append(text);
149      return this;
150   }
151
152   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
153   public JsonWriter appendIf(boolean b, char c) {
154      super.appendIf(b, c);
155      return this;
156   }
157
158   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
159   public JsonWriter appendIf(boolean b, String text) {
160      super.appendIf(b, text);
161      return this;
162   }
163
164   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
165   public JsonWriter appendln(int indent, String text) {
166      super.appendln(indent, text);
167      return this;
168   }
169
170   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
171   public JsonWriter appendln(String text) {
172      super.appendln(text);
173      return this;
174   }
175
176   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
177   public JsonWriter appendUri(Object value) {
178      super.appendUri(value);
179      return this;
180   }
181
182   /**
183    * Serializes the specified object as a JSON attribute name.
184    *
185    * @param s The object being serialized.
186    * @return This object.
187    */
188   @SuppressWarnings({
189      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for JSON attribute writing with encoding
190   })
191   public JsonWriter attr(String s) {
192
193      if (trimStrings)
194         s = trim(s);
195
196      /*
197       * Converts a Java string to an acceptable JSON attribute name. If
198       * simpleAttrs is true, then quotes will only be used if the attribute
199       * name consists of only alphanumeric characters.
200       */
201      boolean doConvert = ! simpleAttrs;     // Always convert when not in lax mode.
202
203      if (s == null) {
204         s = "null";
205         doConvert = false;
206
207      } else {
208
209         // Look for characters that would require the attribute to be quoted.
210         // All possible numbers should be caught here.
211         if (! doConvert) {
212            for (var i = 0; i < s.length() && ! doConvert; i++) {
213               var c = s.charAt(i);
214               doConvert |= ! (i == 0 ? validFirstAttrChars.contains(c) : validAttrChars.contains(c));
215            }
216         }
217
218         // Reserved words and blanks must be quoted.
219         if (! doConvert && (s.isEmpty() || reservedWords.contains(s)))
220            doConvert = true;
221      }
222
223      // If no conversion necessary, just print the attribute as-is.
224      if (doConvert)
225         stringValue(s);
226      else
227         w(s);
228
229      return this;
230   }
231
232   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
233   public JsonWriter cr(int depth) {
234      super.cr(depth);
235      return this;
236   }
237
238   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
239   public JsonWriter cre(int depth) {
240      super.cre(depth);
241      return this;
242   }
243
244   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
245   public JsonWriter i(int indent) {
246      super.i(indent);
247      return this;
248   }
249
250   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
251   public JsonWriter ie(int indent) {
252      super.ie(indent);
253      return this;
254   }
255
256   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
257   public JsonWriter nl(int indent) {
258      super.nl(indent);
259      return this;
260   }
261
262   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
263   public JsonWriter nlIf(boolean flag, int indent) {
264      super.nlIf(flag, indent);
265      return this;
266   }
267
268   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
269   public JsonWriter q() {
270      super.q();
271      return this;
272   }
273
274   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
275   public JsonWriter s() {
276      super.s();
277      return this;
278   }
279
280   /**
281    * Adds a space only if the current indentation level is below maxIndent.
282    *
283    * @param indent The number of spaces to indent.
284    * @return This object.
285    */
286   public JsonWriter s(int indent) {
287      if (indent <= maxIndent)
288         super.s();
289      return this;
290   }
291
292   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
293   public JsonWriter sIf(boolean flag) {
294      super.sIf(flag);
295      return this;
296   }
297
298   /**
299    * Performs an indentation only if we're currently past max indentation.
300    *
301    * @param depth The current indentation depth.
302    * @return This object.
303    */
304   public JsonWriter smi(int depth) {
305      if (depth > maxIndent)
306         super.s();
307      return this;
308   }
309
310   /**
311    * Serializes the specified object as a JSON string value.
312    *
313    * @param s The object being serialized.
314    * @return This object.
315    */
316   @SuppressWarnings({
317      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for JSON string value writing with escaping
318   })
319   public JsonWriter stringValue(String s) {
320      if (s == null)
321         return this;
322      boolean doConvert = false;
323      for (var i = 0; i < s.length() && ! doConvert; i++) {
324         var c = s.charAt(i);
325         doConvert |= ec.contains(c);
326      }
327      q();
328      if (! doConvert) {
329         w(s);
330      } else {
331         for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++) {
332            var c = s.charAt(i);
333            if (ec.contains(c)) {
334               if (c == '\n')
335                  w('\\').w('n');
336               else if (c == '\t')
337                  w('\\').w('t');
338               else if (c == '\b')
339                  w('\\').w('b');
340               else if (c == '\f')
341                  w('\\').w('f');
342               else if (c == quoteChar)
343                  w('\\').w(quoteChar);
344               else if (c == '\\')
345                  w('\\').w('\\');
346               else if (c == '/' && escapeSolidus)
347                  w('\\').w('/');
348               else if (c != '\r')
349                  w(c);
350            } else {
351               w(c);
352            }
353         }
354      }
355      q();
356      return this;
357   }
358
359   /**
360    * Appends a URI to the output.
361    *
362    * @param uri The URI to append to the output.
363    * @return This object.
364    */
365   public SerializerWriter uriValue(Object uri) {
366      return stringValue(uriResolver.resolve(uri));
367   }
368
369   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
370   public JsonWriter w(char value) {
371      super.w(value);
372      return this;
373   }
374
375   @Override /* Overridden from SerializerWriter */
376   public JsonWriter w(String value) {
377      super.w(value);
378      return this;
379   }
380}
